episode.title: MTG Fast Finance 327: The CMR2 Mythics Debacle
episode.description: James & Cliff get you caught up on all the latest in Modern & Pioneer MTGO meta shifts, fast mover card prices, specs to watch and discuss the CMR2 Commander Deck mythic FEAs only being found in the 2 card sampler packs included with the Commander Decks.
